brief: US military strikes on Iran escalate tensions in the Middle East, while Australia faces emergency service disruptions due to a Telstra outage. In research, new AI models advance game world generation and weather forecasting visualization.
news_summary: US launches fresh strikes on Iran as Trump threatens further action; Telstra's triple-zero issues persist, affecting emergency calls in Australia.
papers_summary: Papers introduce AlayaWorld for long-horizon video game generation and a prompt engineering tutor; also present GeoXplain for on-the-fly visual explanations of weather foundation models.

todays_image.caption: Just as the Douglas M-2 once carried mail across open skies, modern military aircraft now deliver strikes that turn diplomatic routes into aerial battlefields.
todays_image.title: Douglas M-2 model
